title: Drakka Judarrl

{{Quote|I saw many Jedi struck down, yes. I saw the power wielded by the Emperor and his lethal weapon, Darth Vader. I wish I could wipe those memories from my mind.|Drakka Judarrl|<ref name="SWG:DJ" />}}
'''Drakka Judarrl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] until she escaped with her [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] from the ravages of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. Later, she hid out on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], directing the resistance among the local [[Dantari]] tribes.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I came to Dantooine when the Rebel base was first established here. I wanted to study them to understand the state of the Rebellion. I think I must reveal myself to the Empire soon. I sense our time is coming. In the meantime, I'll continue to organize strikes against the Empire with the help of the Dantari. Will you help them?|Drakka Judarrl|<ref name="SWG:DJ" />}}
It is unknown who Judarrl's Jedi Master was—all she ever said was that "[[Drakka Judarrl's Master|he]] became one with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] long ago," that she was only a Padawan at the time, and that he saved her from the murder of the other Jedi during the Great Purge. Presumably her ordeal during her escape and her subsequent survival served as her ''de facto'' [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Jedi Trials]], because she claimed to be a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], and indeed feared that she was the only one of her kind, though she claimed that she "sensed the presence of a few others." However, her master had told her never to use her [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]], for fear that [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] agents would discover her hiding place.<ref name="SWG:DJ" />

[[File:Contention_SWGTCG.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Drakka Judarrl on Dantooine.]]
Unfortunately for Judarrl, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself caught up with her Master and slew him. Judarrl managed to escape, however, with the help of a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who had been aiding her Master. She came to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] when the [[Dantooine base/Legends|Rebel base]] was first established, and hid in the ruins of the [[Jedi Enclave]], making her home in a deep cave behind the falls close to the ruin. Her hope in coming to Dantooine was to make contact with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base hidden there, to discover the state of the resistance, and aid the rebellion in any way she could. She took charge of guerrilla activities among the native Dantari tribes, disrupting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] activities on Dantooine as best she could.<ref name="SWG:DJ" />

While there, she did meet with a Rebel operative, informing them of her past before tasking them with intercepting a squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to stop them from slaughtering dozens of natives. The individual managed to perform the task and, upon returning to Judarrl, was given another; to rescue the [[Unidentified Dantari raider|child]] of the Dantari chieftain who had been assisting Judarrl from the Imperials. The individual accepted this challenge and, after defeating the chieftain's Imperial guards, brought him to Judarrl where they were once again informed of another task.<ref name="SWG:DJ" />

Later, Judarrl had been informed that an Imperial by the name of [[Luthik Uwyr]] had arrived on the planet and was organizing some of the natives into a deadly strike force by teaching them to use the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. She decided that he had to be stopped before such agents of evil could spread their practices offworld. The individual accepted this task also, and managed to slay a group of [[darksider]]s, and so was rewarded by Judarrl with a blue [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]].<ref name="SWG:DJ" />

[[File:DrakkaJudarrl-CotF.png|thumb|250px|right|And older Judarrl in her cave on Dantooine shortly before her death.]]
At some point, Drakka Judarrl also helped a Rebel agent to escape from [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Adrick]] and his troopers by clouding their minds. The Rebel had previously found the [[Codex of Tython]], an ancient Jedi [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]], for which Judarrl's father had looked for many years. The Holocron, however, was missing several fragments. Judarrl herself had one, which she gave to the agent, before sending him on a mission to complete the Holocron.<ref>{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}}</ref> After completing the mission, the rebels returned the Holocron to Drakka for study. After studying the ancient artifact, several Alliance agents stayed with the Jedi to protect it from enemy hands. However, she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] organized an attack on the cave and the holocron was reclaimed by an Imperial agent.<ref>{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Dark Side scenario campaign}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Drakka Judarrl appears at the [[:w:c:swg:Jedi Temple Ruins|Jedi Temple Ruins]] in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' and gives a series of quests to Rebel-aligned players who seek her out.<ref name="SWG:DJ" /> Ina ddition, there is an agent of the Empire camped outside of the ruins as well, who gives Jedi-related quests to Imperial-aligned players.<ref name="SWG:LU">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Luthik Uwyr|Dantooine}}</ref> Drakka refers to the agent, [[Luthik Uwyr]], in her dialogue,<ref name="SWG:DJ" /> but he never mentions her, instead asking the players to kill an untrained Padawan he has discovered some distance from the ruins, without any indication clarifying whether this Jedi was intended to be Drakka Judarrl.<ref name="SWG:LU" />
